wins: AI semiconductor revenue grew 65% year-over-year to $20 billion
Record $18 billion revenue in Q4 2025, above guidance
AI revenue expected to double year-on-year to $8.2 billion in Q1 2026
Acquired a fifth XPU customer with a $1 billion order
Strong backlog of $73 billion in AI-related orders
risks: Non-AI semiconductor revenue is flat year-over-year
Potential dilution of gross margins due to system sales
Supply chain challenges with advanced packaging
Uncertainty around OpenAI's contribution in fiscal 2026
Global minimum tax impacting non-GAAP tax rate
